args:
set -eu
python3 -m py_compile vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py vllm/vllm/compilation/backends.py
cd vllm
.venv-codex/bin/python -m pytest --noconftest tests/test_aot_artifact_manifest_light.py -q -k 'comments or unreachable_python_helpers or reachable_global_dependencies or torch_internal_moves or transient_placeholder_names' >/tmp/vllm-compile-input-cleanup.txt
grep -q '5 passed' /tmp/vllm-compile-input-cleanup.txt
cd ..
grep -q 'reachable_symbols_by_path' vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
grep -q 'python_ast_reachable' vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
grep -q 'inspect.getsourcefile' vllm/vllm/compilation/backends.py
printf 'vllm-compile-input-cleanup\n'
